Removed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to assess performance improvements and fix issues before wider implementation.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagCreateUncompressedRbxmForOta2_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables the creation of uncompressed RBXM files for better performance.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times and reduces lag for players.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagGatherContentIdsSupportContent_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables gathering of content IDs for better content management.
Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances the ability to track and manage user-generated content.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagLuaAppEdpBackendV2LogUniverseIdForEvents_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Logs the universe ID for events in the backend of the Lua application.
Removed_Other.purpose: Facilitates better tracking and analysis of events related to specific game universes.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagUseDynamicStrokePositioning_PlaceFilter
Removed_Other.mechanism: Implements dynamic positioning for stroke elements in place filters.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves the user experience by making it easier to find and select places.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagUseMultipleStrokes_PlaceFilter
Removed_Other.mechanism: Allows the use of multiple strokes in place filtering for smoother operations.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves the experience of placing objects by making it easier to filter and select multiple items.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagUseScaledStrokes_PlaceFilter
Removed_Other.mechanism: Applies a scaling effect to strokes in place filtering.
Removed_Other.purpose: Players see improved visuals and clarity in game graphics.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagWindowsSystemThemeEnabled_IXP
Removed_Other.mechanism: Integrates the game's appearance with the Windows system theme for a cohesive look.
Removed_Other.purpose: Makes the game interface match the player's Windows theme for a more personalized experience.

Added_Body.name: FFlagAddToSessionTrackingHttpSuccessfulPostBodySizeAllPerSession_Staged
Added_Body.mechanism: Tracks the size of successful HTTP post requests per session.
Added_Body.purpose: Helps improve server performance by monitoring data usage.

Added_Body.name: FFlagAddToSessionTrackingHttpSuccessfulPostBodySizeTelemetryPerSession_Staged
Added_Body.mechanism: Tracks the size of successful HTTP post requests for each session.
Added_Body.purpose: Helps developers understand data usage and optimize server performance.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Links the game version to a specific code version in the repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and ensure players are using the latest features.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how dynamic strings handle timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy and performance of time-related string displays.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string for the repository's Git hash.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by quickly referencing the version of the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling by flipping timestamps quickly.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance when processing time-related strings.
